data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes choices in UI to reduce decision time for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified interface with prioritized options and a clean design.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes button size and placement for better usability.
data.technical_spec: Larger buttons for frequent actions, strategically placed elements.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items together to improve comprehension.
data.technical_spec: Logical grouping of video-related actions and information.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Balances visual appeal and functionality to enhance user experience.
data.technical_spec: Consistent style guide and minimalist design principles.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Designs elements familiar to users for intuitive navigation.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation patterns and familiar icons.
